title: MTP benchmark results: the nature of the generative task dictates whether you will benefit (coding) or get slower inference (creative) from speculative inference. No other factor comes close.
summary: MTP benchmark results: the nature of the generative task dictates whether you will benefit (coding) or get slower inference (creative) from speculative inference. No other factor comes close.
whyItMatters: A community signal rather than a settled claim. Useful for spotting what builders are trying, what problems are recurring, and which projects may deserve a closer look.
